creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-01-28 16:18:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/steadyflow Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Steadyflow is a GTK+ based download manager that aims for minimalism, and
  ease of use. It should be easy to control, whether from the GUI, command
  line, or D-Bus.
  
  WWW:    https://launchpad.net/steadyflow
  
  PR:             ports/154354
  Submitted by:   Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier at gmail.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.417     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/deskutils/steadyflow/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/deskutils/steadyflow/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/deskutils/steadyflow/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/deskutils/steadyflow/pkg-plist (new)
